chapter_question: How does curvature act like relative acceleration between neighboring geodesics?
inspection_targets: Positive and negative K bend neighboring geodesics together or apart.
Geodesic fans separate the signs of curvature.
Geodesic deviation predicts circumference and area defects.

source_span.focus: Interprets curvature dynamically through geodesic deviation and the Jacobi equation.
source_span.label: Chapter 28
source_span.title: Curvature as a Force between Neighbouring Geodesics
topics: Zero curvature and parallel behavior in the plane
Positive curvature and convergence on the sphere
Negative curvature and divergence on the pseudosphere
